name: Chiel's Take
description: Opinion column from Chiel Hendriks (Managing Director, PwC Canada). Strategic perspective on the agentic and generative AI questions business leaders should be asking. Hand-written, no automation.

endpoints.name: Articles index (JSON)
endpoints.description: Every published take — slug, title, date, read time, excerpt. Sorted newest-first.

endpoints.name: Full archive (markdown)
endpoints.description: Every published take inlined as full markdown for LLM consumption.

endpoints.name: Markdown homepage
endpoints.description: Bulleted markdown index of every published take.

endpoints.name: Per-article markdown twin
endpoints.description: Clean-markdown twin of any article — substitute the slug from articles.json.

endpoints.name: LLM/agent guide
endpoints.description: Site overview, every published take, and pointers.
